details.body:
## API Change Check

APIView identified API level changes in this PR and created the following API reviews

[com.azure.resourcemanager:azure-resourcemanager-confluent](https://spa.apiview.dev/review/7423ac19284641439b2f696e708e2255?activeApiRevisionId=444b55cf53b94455893367f1d53080cc)
<!-- Fetch URI: https://apiview.dev/api/pullrequests?pullRequestNumber=47954&repoName=Azure/azure-sdk-for-java&commitSHA=69d75df58d1329a2cdbf858c253b302da6592107 -->

## Pull request overview

This pull request updates the Azure SDK for Java's Confluent Resource Manager library to use TypeSpec Code Generator instead of AutoRest Code Generator, targeting API version 2025-08-18-preview.

**Changes:**
- Migration from AutoRest to TypeSpec code generation
- Addition of new resource management APIs (Environments, Clusters, Connectors, Topics)
- Conversion of mutable model classes to immutable with read-only properties
- Removal of validation methods from generated

## API Change Check

APIView identified API level changes in this PR and created the following API reviews

[sdk/resourcemanager/confluent/armconfluent](https://spa.apiview.dev/review/0aad09afe38e4dd29dea544c6081db52?activeApiRevisionId=2f2d6c17c91d479caf8d5698adef1428)
<!-- Fetch URI: https://apiview.dev/api/pullrequests?pullRequestNumber=26002&repoName=Azure/azure-sdk-for-go&commitSHA=0f99a788559a020be931eb358508971d6c8fa6a6 -->

## Pull request overview

This PR updates the Azure Confluent resource manager SDK from API version 2024-02-13 to 2025-08-18-preview, migrating from AutoRest to TypeSpec-based code generation. This is a major version bump (v2.0.0-beta.1) that includes breaking changes and new functionality for managing Confluent clusters, connectors, environments, and topics.

**Changes:**
- Migrated from AutoRest to TypeSpec code generation (Go Code Generator)
- Updated API version from 2024-02-13 to 2025-08-18

## Pull request overview

This PR is an automated SDK regeneration for the Azure Confluent Management client library, transitioning from AutoRest to the Python Code Generator for API version 2025-08-18-preview. The changes represent a major version bump (2.1.0 → 3.0.0b1) with significant breaking changes, including client renaming, new operations for clusters/connectors/topics/environments, and modernized packaging configuration.

**Changes:**
- Major version bump to 3.0.0b1 with breaking change

events.description: `PartnerInfoBase` is declared as `abstract` in PartnerInfoBase.cs, but this partial declaration is m

details.body: `PartnerInfoBase` is declared as `abstract` in PartnerInfoBase.cs, but this partial declaration is missing the `abstract` modifier. Partial type declarations must match modifiers; as-is this will not compile. Make this declaration `public abstract partial class PartnerInfoBase` (and keep the implemented interfaces).

events.description: `ConnectorServiceTypeInfoBase` is declared as `abstract` in ConnectorServiceTypeInfoBase.cs, but thi

details.body: `ConnectorServiceTypeInfoBase` is declared as `abstract` in ConnectorServiceTypeInfoBase.cs, but this partial declaration is missing the `abstract` modifier. Partial type declarations must match modifiers; as-is this will not compile. Update this to `public abstract partial class ConnectorServiceTypeInfoBase`.

events.description: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty str

details.body: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty string. If the service returns `nextLink: ""` (common when there is no next page), this will throw and break paging. Add a `string.IsNullOrEmpty(...)` check and treat empty as null.

events.description: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Val

details.body: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Value` becomes null and later enumeration can throw. Default `value` to an empty list before constructing the model (similar to other generated list result models).

events.description: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty str

details.body: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty string. If the service returns `nextLink: ""` when there is no next page, this will throw. Add a `string.IsNullOrEmpty(...)` check and treat empty as null.

events.description: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Val

details.body: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Value` becomes null and later enumeration can throw. Default `value` to an empty list before constructing the model.

events.description: In tsp-location.yaml, `additionalDirectories:` is present but has no value. In other tsp-location.ya

details.body: In tsp-location.yaml, `additionalDirectories:` is present but has no value. In other tsp-location.yaml files this is either omitted or set to an explicit empty array (`additionalDirectories: []`). Keeping it empty can be parsed differently by YAML tooling and is harder to reason about—please either remove the key or set it to `[]` (or a list of directories if needed).

events.description: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Val

details.body: `value` is passed through as-is when deserializing. If the `value` property is missing or null, `Value` becomes null and later enumeration (including serialization) can throw. Default `value` to an empty list before constructing the response model.

events.description: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty str

details.body: `nextLink` is deserialized with `new Uri(property.Value.GetString())` without guarding for empty string. If the service returns an empty nextLink when paging ends, this will throw. Add a `string.IsNullOrEmpty(...)` check and treat empty as null.

**Changes:**
- Add `tsp-location.yaml` to pin the TypeSpec source location/commit for future regeneration.
- Regenerate Confluent ARM SDK code for 2025-08-18-preview (new resources/models/serialization/rest ops; updated
